sponsors.name: Visit St. Pete Clearwater
sponsors.message: This issue is sponsored by Visit St. Pete Clearwater — where sunshine meets sophistication. Perfect weather, stunning venues, and world-class hospitality make St. Pete Clearwater the ideal destination for your next meeting or event.

sponsors.name: Visit Orlando
sponsors.message: Orlando delivers beyond expectations for meeting planners. World-class convention facilities, 450+ hotels, diverse dining, and entertainment options that will make your event unforgettable.

sponsors.name: Destination DC
sponsors.message: The nation's capital offers unparalleled venues and experiences for your next event. From iconic landmarks to cutting-edge facilities, Washington, DC delivers memorable meetings.

sponsors.name: Visit Tampa Bay
sponsors.message: Discover why Tampa Bay is one of the country’s most exciting destinations for meetings and events. With stunning waterfront venues, year-round sunshine, and a vibrant mix of culture, cuisine, and entertainment, Tampa Bay offers the perfect backdrop to elevate your next gathering. Whether you’re planning an intimate retreat or a large-scale conference, Visit Tampa Bay is ready to help you bring your vision to life.
